subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Through thy coming and descent thereupon, barren lands have turned verdant, and trees have yielded their fruit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اسمی قد اخضرت اراضی جدبا بورودک فیها و نزولک علیها و اثمرت اشجار
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
